description: URL validation removed before redirect — attacker can supply an external URL via the `next` param.
diff:
diff --git a/views.py b/views.py
--- a/views.py
+++ b/views.py
@@ -1,5 +1,3 @@
 def after_login(request):
     next_url = request.args.get("next", "/dashboard")
-    if not next_url.startswith("/"):
-        next_url = "/dashboard"
     return redirect(next_url)
